holdings.infoBox: EELV is an equity ETF with a total of 223 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Emerging Markets Low Volatility ETF (EELV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a volatility-weighted index of emerging markets firms. EELV was launched on Jan 13, 2012 and is issued by Invesco.
